_comment: Curated gene->inheritance overrides (validation strategy F14). The MONDO/HPO gene-disease export stamps one gene-wide inheritance value (first-in-file) onto every disease for a gene, which mislabels classic autosomal-dominant genes as recessive. These overrides assert the established mode of inheritance for the well-characterised dominant genes the audit named. Source: established clinical genetics (GeneReviews / OMIM). Keys are uppercase HGNC symbols.
